Legal

  • Privacy Policy

  • Privacy Center
EXPERIENCE BETTER TRAVEL DAYS

Travel with T-Mobile.

Whether it’s across the country or across the globe, your phone just works. No setup. No data roaming fees. No hidden charges.

Join now

With qualifying plans. Capable device required. Not for extended international use. Coverage not available in some areas. See plan for details.
  • Air travel
  • Data coverage
  • On the road
  • Deals and more

Connect above the clouds.

Free in-flight Wi-Fi to stream, text, and more at 30,000 feet for passengers on Delta, Alaska, Hawaiian, and Southwest airlines —thanks to T-Mobile.

Learn More

Sponsored by T-Mobile via customer loyalty programs. Where available on select Wi-Fi-enabled aircraft. Southwest: Subject to restrictions. Learn more.
ONLY AT T-MOBILE

From off-grid to online.

T-Satellite keeps you connected virtually anywhere by powering texts, voice chat via WhatsApp, and essential apps in places no carrier tower can reach. Included on our Experience Beyond plan.

Find out more
Texting & select satellite-ready apps with compatible device in most outdoor areas in the U.S. where you can see the sky. Satellite service, including text to 911, may be delayed, limited, or unavailable. Included with Experience Beyond or $10/mo.; auto renews monthly. Cancel anytime in T-Life App.

We go where you go.

Stay connected when you travel.

With plans that include high-speed data and unlimited texting in 215+ countries and destinations.

Plus, T-Satellite coverage in Canada and New Zealand.

Find out more

T-Satellite: Texting & select satellite-ready apps with compatible device in most outdoor areas in the U.S., Canada, and New Zealand where you can see the sky. Satellite service, including text to 911 or emergency services, may be delayed, limited, or unavailable. Included with Experience Beyond or $10/mo.; auto renews monthly. Cancel anytime in T-Life App.

Make calls in Canada and Mexico.

Get free voice and high-speed data with no roaming fees.

Check It out

Not for extended international use. Coverage not available in some areas.

Road trips are a breeze.

Our 5G coverage spans more highway miles than any other carrier.

See your coverage

Capable device required; coverage not available in some areas. Some uses may require certain plan or feature; see plan for details.

See how travel is better with T-Mobile.

LIVE TRANSLATION IS HERE

America’s Best Network speaks your language.

Learn more
Talk with people around the world, just by using your phone. Call for transportation, information, and more with ease. No apps, and no fees. Your voice. 50+ languages. Best Network: Best Mobile Network in the U.S. based on analysis by Ookla® of Speedtest Intelligence® data 2H 2025.
SAVE MORE WITH T-MOBILE

15% off at all Hilton brands worldwide.

Get details
Deposit & Hilton Honors Membership req’d. for 15% discount.
T-MOBILE TRAVEL

Save up to 40% on travel.

Visit T-Mobile TRAVEL
See T-Mobile TRAVEL site for details.
HIT THE ROAD

1 Year of AAA On Us.

Learn more
Requires active voice line on eligible plan, registration, and validation. Auto-renews at standard club rate after 1 year On Us. Cancel anytime.
DOLLAR CAR RENTAL

Return your rental car at Dollar Car Rental without refueling it.

Get details
TRAVEL ANYWHERE

Coverage down the road and across the globe.

Check out our coverage
High-speed data and texting with qualifying plan in 215+ countries and destinations. Capable device required. Not for extended international use. Coverage not available in some areas. See plan for details.
T-MOBILE BENEFITS

More than just talk and text.

Check out the benefits
With Qualifying Plans. See plan for details.
STATESIDE CALLING

Unlimited international calls for just $15/mo.

Get the details
Call landlines in 70+ destinations and mobile lines in 30+ destinations. Qualifying service required.
GET MORE WITH T-MOBILE

Explore all travel benefits.

Join T-Mobile

If you cancel entire account before receiving 24 credits, credits stop and balance on required finance agreement is due; for phones, contact us. Bill credits end if you pay off device early. For well-qualified customers, plus tax & $35 device connection charge.

Got questions?

  • T-Mobile customers on most plans now get faster data speeds than before, including plans with up to 15GB of high-speed data in more than 215+ countries and destinations. Most customers across the globe get unlimited data up to 256kbps. Experience Beyond customers get up to 15GB of high-speed data worldwide in 215+ countries and destinations. Experience More customers get up to 5GB of high-speed data worldwide in 215+ countries and destinations. In addition, customers get up to 40% in savings when booking select hotels and rental cars with T-Mobile Travel. Plus, a year of AAA on us for Experience Beyond, Experience More, and small business plans.

    Click here for the full list of eligible plans that get high-speed data abroad, here for AAA on us for a year, and here for T-Mobile Travel and Shell savings from T-Mobile Tuesdays®.

  • T-Mobile customers on most plans get faster speeds, including plans with up to 15GB of high-speed data in more than 215+ countries and destinations. Most customers get unlimited data up to 256kbps. Experience Beyond customers get up to 15GB of high-speed data worldwide in 215+ countries and destinations. Experience More customers get up to 5GB of high-speed data worldwide in 215+ countries and destinations.

  • T-Mobile is the exclusive wireless partner of AAA. And now, T-Mobile postpaid customers on an eligible plan get a one-year Basic or Classic AAA membership at no extra cost. Membership benefits include towing, tire service, fuel delivery, and more.
    After the year on us, the membership will automatically renew at the standard rate (approximately $60 a year on average, depending on location). You can cancel anytime.

  • Yes, we keep customers connected—and that includes our business customers too. Experience More for Business and Experience Beyond for Business plans can take advantage of high-speed data abroad, and up to 40% savings when booking hotels and Pay Now car rentals on T-MobileTravel.com. Small business plans, up to 12 voice lines, can get a year of AAA on us.

  • T-Mobile Travel is a site with travel deals exclusively for T-Mobile and Metro by T-Mobile customers. Save up to 40% on hotels or Pay Now rental cars, book flights and more.

Hello! Want to stay logged in?

To keep your accounts safe, you'll be automatically logged out in: 

Share your screen while on a call or in store

Get guided support from an Expert in real time

  • For your security, personal info, tabs, and notifications are automatically hidden.
  • You can stop screen sharing at any time.
  • Experts can only see what’s on T-Mobile.com.
  • Don’t use screen share while driving or in any situation where it's unsafe to focus on your screen.

By clicking 'Accept and continue,' you are consenting to allow the Expert to view your screen for assisted navigation. This session may be recorded. To learn more, please visit the  T-Mobile Privacy Notice.

Next: Generate a code to share with your Expert

Share this code with your Expert

code

Once your code has been successfully entered by your Expert, this window will close and continue to the session.

Allow screen sharing with your Expert?

Personal and sensitive data is hidden for your security and privacy.

End your session?

Ending your session will stop sharing your screen, but will not end your call.

Your session has ended

Your screen is no longer being shared with your Expert.

You are already in an active session

Your code has expired

Generate a new one to share with your Expert.
